site.name: AlugaPro
site.tagline: Complete platform for property and vehicle rental management, with digital contracts and financial control.

hero.title: Your rentals organized, from contract to payment
hero.subtitle: Properties, vehicles, digital contracts, charges, and tenant portal — everything integrated for people who manage rentals every day.

features.title: Everything you need to manage rentals
features.subtitle: Features designed to simplify the manager's routine and improve the tenant experience.

propertiesVehicles.title: Properties and vehicles
propertiesVehicles.description: Register, organize, and track your entire rental portfolio in one place.

digitalContracts.title: Digital contracts
digitalContracts.description: Create, customize, and sign contracts with landlord, tenant, and witnesses remotely.

autoCharges.title: Automatic charges
autoCharges.description: Track rent payments, receipts, delinquency, and cash flow with a clear view.

tenantPortal.title: Tenant portal
tenantPortal.description: Tenants track payments, submit receipts, and access their active contract.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Due-date and charge alerts to keep communication up to date with tenants.

reports.title: Reports and dashboard
reports.description: Indicators, charts, and exports for fast, confident decisions.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: In three steps you structure your entire rental operation on AlugaPro.

register.title: Register your assets
register.description: Properties, vehicles, owners, and tenants enter the system in a few minutes.

formalize.title: Formalize contracts
formalize.description: Use system templates or customize clauses and collect digital signatures.

manageCharges.title: Manage charges
manageCharges.description: Generate monthly rent, track payments, and reduce delinquency with full visibility.

pricing.title: Simple plans, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Start free for 14 days. No card required. Cancel anytime.
pricing.tenantPortalFree: Tenant portal is always free. Tenants never pay.
pricing.compareSubtitle: See exactly what is included in each subscription level.

forWhom.title: Who AlugaPro is for
forWhom.subtitle: A complete solution for anyone who needs to professionalize rental management without losing agility.
audiences: Rental managers and property management companies
Owners with multiple properties or vehicles
Businesses that need integrated financial control
Tenants who want autonomy in the payment portal
forWhom.cardDescription: Access the system as a manager or enter the tenant portal to track payments and contracts.

ctaBanner.title: Start your free trial today
ctaBanner.subtitle: 14 days with full access to the Pro plan. No commitment. Set up your company in under 5 minutes.
perks: Unlimited properties and vehicles during trial

recursos.heroSubtitle: From registering a property to collecting rent. Contracts, charges, tenant portal, reports — all integrated in one platform.
recursos.ctaBannerSubtitle: Start your free trial and explore every feature with no commitment.

propertiesVehicles.title: Properties and vehicles in one place
propertiesVehicles.description: Register, organize, and track your entire rental portfolio — residential, commercial properties, and vehicles — with a full view of status, active contracts, and history.

digitalContracts.title: Digital contracts with electronic signature
digitalContracts.description: Generate professional contracts from customizable templates and collect signatures from landlord, tenant, and witnesses remotely — no paper, no travel.

autoCharges.title: Automatic charges and financial control
autoCharges.description: Track rent, register payment receipts, monitor delinquency, and get a clear view of cash flow across the whole operation.

tenantPortal.title: Tenant portal — always free
tenantPortal.description: Tenants get their own panel to view the active contract, track charges, submit payment receipts, and open requests — without calling the manager.

notifications.title: Automatic notifications and reminders
notifications.description: Reduce delinquency with automatic due-date alerts, open charges, and contract updates. Communication stays current without manual effort.

reports.title: Dashboard and advanced reports
reports.description: Make decisions based on data. Track performance indicators, generate financial reports, and export everything to Excel or PDF for full operational control.

affiliatesPage.heroSubtitle: Anyone can refer — brokers, professional sellers, influencers, or anyone who knows an owner of properties, vehicles, or equipment. Refer AlugaPro and earn for every active client.
affiliatesPage.ctaBecomeAffiliate: I want to be an affiliate
affiliatesPage.earnSubtitle: Recurring 7% commission on the monthly fee of every active client you refer.
affiliatesPage.commissionDescription: Every month, as long as the client you referred stays active, you receive your share — you only need to keep your payout details up to date.
commissionPerks: Paid automatically, straight to your account
affiliatesPage.waitingPeriodDescription: Commission payment only starts after the referred client completes 15 consecutive days as an active client — ensuring the referral truly stuck.
waitingPeriodPerks: No bureaucracy — counting is automatic in your panel
You track each referral's status in real time
affiliatesPage.forWhomSubtitle: Your profession does not matter. It works for brokers, professional sellers, influencers, or anyone who knows an owner of properties, vehicles, or equipment.
affiliatesPage.forWhomBadge: Open to everyone — including professional sellers

anyone.title: Anyone
anyone.description: You do not need to be a broker or have sales experience. If you know someone who rents properties, vehicles, or equipment, you can already refer.

professionals.title: Sellers and independent professionals
professionals.description: Professional sellers, lawyers, accountants, and agents can also join — there is no restriction.

brokers.title: Brokers and real estate agencies
brokers.description: Already in direct contact with owners — refer AlugaPro during your own client meetings.

creators.title: Influencers and content creators
creators.description: From any niche, not only real estate — recommend it to your audience and turn it into recurring income.

affiliatesPage.howItWorksSubtitle: From referral to payment, in four simple steps.

indicate.title: Refer
indicate.description: Introduce AlugaPro to someone who manages rentals of properties, vehicles, or equipment.

freeTrial.title: Free trial
freeTrial.description: Your referral tries the platform for 14 days, with no credit card and no commitment.

activeClient.title: Active client
activeClient.description: When they subscribe to a paid plan, the referral is confirmed and registered under your name.

youEarn.title: You get paid
youEarn.description: Receive 7% recurring commission on the monthly fee, starting after 15 days as an active client.

affiliatesPage.ctaBannerSubtitle: Talk to us and join the AlugaPro affiliate program.
